description: Showcase a local Saudi business with location tag, service description, and product highlights to build community awareness and drive foot traffic.
structural_recipe: Post should include: (1) business name in both Arabic and English, (2) precise street address with location pin emoji, (3) business type/specialty in Arabic, (4) upcoming offerings or differentiators, (5) specific product recommendation with descriptive details and personal endorsement, (6) high-quality product photography. Use casual, conversational tone mixing Arabic and English.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value authentic local recommendations and community-driven discovery. Location transparency and specific product praise create trust. The bilingual approach appeals to diverse audiences. Personal tasting notes signal genuine experience rather than promotional content.
transplantation_caveats: Requires accurate, updated business information to maintain credibility
Location-based targeting works best in major metro areas (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam)
Product descriptions must be honest to avoid perception as paid promotion
Verify business operating hours and seasonal availability before posting
cultural_constraints: Ensure respectful language and appropriate gender dynamics if featuring staff
Avoid posting during prayer times (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha)
Align promotional messaging with local values and Islamic guidelines
